display.purpose: Page titles, error page headings, modal titles. Max one per view.

title.purpose: Section headings, card titles, sidebar section labels.

body.purpose: All prose content. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: UI labels, button text, nav links, table headers.

mono.purpose: Code snippets, env var names, shell commands, file paths.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals, command palette, dropdowns. Communicates surface is above the page.

shadows.name: toast
shadows.purpose: Notification banners. Lighter than floating; stays contextual.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Default for interactive state transitions (button hover, input focus, nav active).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. One per view. Signal Indigo fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; min-height: 2.5rem; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #4338ca; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action sharing space with a primary button. Transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #6366f1; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.5rem; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.10); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Base Button
components.description: Tertiary/table-row actions. No color, low visual weight.
components.css: .ds-btn-base { background: transparent; color: #45484d; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2rem; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-base:hover { background: #e6e6e6; color: #000000; } .ds-btn-base:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Outlined stroke, indigo focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #000000; border: 1px solid #cccccc; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; width: 100%; min-height: 3rem; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-input.error { border-color: #ea580c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(234,88,12,0.15); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for grouped content. Place on bg-base-200 for visual separation without shadow.
components.html:
Configuración

Variables de entorno del proyecto.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #000000; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.005em; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #45484d; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: 56px top bar. White in light mode, dark charcoal in dark mode. No shadow.
components.html:
Dj-Skeleton
InicioAdmin
components.css: .ds-navbar { background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e6e6e6; padding: 0 1.5rem; height: 3.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-navbar-brand { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 700; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-navbar-links { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-navbar-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #45484d; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-navbar-link:hover { background: #f3f4f6; color: #000000; } .ds-navbar-link.active { color: #6366f1; background: rgba(99,102,241,0.08); }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Inline and block code. System monospace font. Sunken surface.
components.html:
make deploy

Ejecuta make dev en local.
components.css: .ds-code-block { background: #e6e6e6; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem; font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, 'Cascadia Code', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #000000; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-code-block code { background: none; padding: 0; } .ds-code-inline { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.10); color: #4f46e5; border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; font-family: ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, 'Cascadia Code', monospace; font-size: 0.875em; }

narrative.overview:
This is a design system built on the premise that the best defaults don't require justification. Signal Indigo (#6366f1) is the one accent; the surface is either white or dark charcoal (#3a3a3e); the type is the system font stack. None of this is lazy — it is deliberate. The skeleton has made its decisions, documented them, and trusts the developer to override what needs overriding.

The tone is tool-like: dense where density serves the user, clear where clarity earns trust. A developer looking at a screen built on this system should feel oriented immediately — not charmed, not wowed. The interface disappears into the task.

Dark mode is not a toggle bolted on after the fact. It is a first-class sibling. Both themes share the same spatial grammar; only the color values change.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans family (system-ui) across all roles — no display/body split
Signal Indigo used exclusively for primary actions, current selection, focus rings — not decoration
Elevation via tonal layers (base-100 / base-200 / base-300), never drop-shadows
Compact scale ratio (1.125) — product density, not editorial rhythm
Semantic color vocabulary (success / warning / error / info) standardized across both themes

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Indigo is used on ≤10% of any screen at rest. A screen where everything is indigo has no signals. Reserve it for what matters: the primary button, the active nav item, the focus ring.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Color is semantic here, not aesthetic. If a color is not carrying meaning (action, state, severity), it is not on the screen.

rules.name: The Single Stack Rule
rules.body: One font family, no exceptions. No display face imported for headings. Import cost: zero. Consistency: guaranteed.

rules.name: The Label Floor Rule
rules.body: No UI text below 0.8125rem (13px). Below that, text stops being readable; it is just visual texture.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest have no shadow. If you are reaching for shadow-xl on a card that is not floating, stop. Use bg-base-200 as the background instead.

rules.name: The Float Exception
rules.body: Shadows appear only when a surface is genuinely detached from flow: modals, dropdowns, tooltips, toasts. Not cards. Not sidebars. Not hero sections.

dos: Do use bg-base-200 as the page shell so bg-base-100 cards visually float without any shadow.
Do cap body text at 65–75ch with max-w-prose or an equivalent constraint.
Do use the three-level tonal scale consistently: base-300 for borders/dividers, base-200 for backgrounds, base-100 for content surfaces.
Do apply text-wrap: balance to all h1–h3 headings.
Do include every interactive state (hover, focus, active, disabled) before marking a component done.
Do use monospace for any string the developer will copy — env var names, commands, file paths, token values.
Do test contrast in both light and dark themes separately.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, callouts, or alerts.
Don't use gradient fills on buttons, headings, or backgrounds. background-clip: text with a gradient is prohibited.
Don't apply glassmorphism effects (backdrop-filter blur on cards, translucent panels) as decoration.
Don't build a feature-grid card section with identical-sized cards sharing an icon + heading + text structure with no variation.
Don't use tiny all-caps tracked eyebrows above every section heading.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't let body text, placeholders, or labels fall below 4.5:1 contrast against their background.
Don't reach for a modal as the first solution for any secondary flow.
Don't ship a loading state as a spinner centered in a content area. Use skeleton states.
